ham.subject: Out of Office: Rajesh Kumar – Back 15 Oct
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Namaste! I am currently out of office and will be back on 15 Oct 2026. During this period, I will have limited access to my emails. For urgent matters, please reach out to my colleague, Priya Sharma, at priya.sharma@company.com or call the office line 011-2345678.

Thank you for your understanding.

Regards,
Rajesh

spam.subject: Important: Your XYZ University Scholarship Application
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that your application for the XYZ University Merit Scholarship 2024 has been shortlisted. To secure your scholarship, please confirm your intent by visiting the following link: <URL>.

Please provide your bank details (Account Number, IFSC) for the scholarship disbursement. The scholarship amount will be credited within 5 working days after verification. Failure to submit the details within 48 hours may result in forfeiture of your scholarship.

This is an official notice from the University’s Scholarship Office. For any queries, contact the office at <URL>.

Best regards,
XYZ University Scholarship Office
